---
title: "Compare two runs of MAGMA GSA on the same input data"
author: "Xiang Zhu, Ph.D."
date: "First created on 2025-04-04; Last modified on `r Sys.Date()`"
output: workflowr::wflow_html
editor_options:
  chunk_output_type: console
---

```{r}
suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  library(ggplot2)
  library(xzTools)
})

old_dt <- data.table::fread(
  file = "/Users/xiangzhu/Downloads/magma_20251006/20251119/n1_l_qsm_50th_siletti2023.gsa.out",
  skip = 4
)
new_dt <- data.table::fread(
  file = "/Users/xiangzhu/Documents/1-Projects/brain2gene/magma/single_20241220_eur/output_NCBI37.3.gene.loc_up35kb_down10kb/n1_l_qsm_50th_siletti2023.gsa.out",
  skip = 4
)

identical(old_dt[, 1:3], new_dt[, 1:3])

res <- xzTools::compare_2dts(
  new_dt = new_dt,
  old_dt = old_dt,
  cols_to_compare = names(old_dt)[-c(1:3)],
  cols_to_match = NULL,
  get_exact_match = FALSE,
  get_correlation = TRUE,
  get_regression = TRUE,
  get_scatterplot = TRUE
)

res$fig
```
